title: AgentDefinition
description: A Velocity agent role definition. Roles are generic and fixed; stack specificity is delivered through skill wiring.

category.description: Engineer = primary implementation; Domain Specialist = advisory/consultative; Cognitive = cross-discipline reasoning

description.description: One-paragraph description of this agent's purpose and behaviour

primary_agent.description: True for the Engineer — the agent that runs /loop and picks up implementation tasks

skills.description: Skills always wired to this agent (stack-independent)

stack_conditional_skills.description: Skills wired conditionally based on detected stack signals

subagents.description: Subagent IDs always activated beneath this agent

stack_conditional_subagents.description: Subagents activated conditionally based on detected stack signals

context_injection.description: What .velocity/ content is injected into this agent's system prompt

adr_injection_tier.description: Depth of ADR injection into system prompt

system_prompt_template.description: Path to system prompt template for this agent (relative to agents/)

handoff_to.description: Agent IDs this agent can hand off to
